text:
> Maintainer of www/mozplugger,
>
> Please note that PR ports/104474 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/104474

I approve this patch, though my e-mail address has changed to
lorenl@north-winds.org.  I rarely check lorenl@alzatex.com anymore.

>
> --
